w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Owns core algorithm implementation; integrates modules; maintains main branch health.
Evenings except Sunday, Thursday, and Friday.
Creates test plan; edge cases; validates outputs; documents verification evidence.
Creates test plan; edge cases; validates outputs; documents verification evidence.
before 12:00 PM, most evenings except Tuesdays after 6:30 PM.
Assembles report/video; ensures run instructions; tracks deliverables; merges documentation.
from 10:00 AM-1:00 PM and 4:00 PM-6:00 PM
. Saturdays from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM & 3:00 PM-6:00 PM.
Checkpoint package: update plan + docs + invite verification
Ensure repository structure is complete, project plan written, checkpoint submitted
Final polish: run instructions + release tag
Negative tests: invalid inputs produce clear error messages
Maximum size input within assignment constraints.
Summary of Update (what changed / what completed)
Part 1 core implementation drafted, unit tests drafted.
